summary: Frontend-only UI verification of weROI homepage after major redesign (lime theme, centered nav, full-screen hero, case studies section, status link replacing pill, 'Start a Project' CTA). All requested home-page features rendered correctly. Two issues found: (1) ResellRight case study card 'View Live Site' link points to the wrong URL (duplicates DropQuick JA URL), (2) Em dashes (—) still present in non-home components even though brief said 'remove all em dashes'.

ui_bugs.issue: View Live Site URL is a copy/paste mistake — points to https://dropquick-ja.preview.emergentagent.com instead of the actual ResellRight URL. Two cards open the same site.

User explicitly asked to 'remove all em dashes (—) from text'. Home.jsx is clean (0), but other rendered components still contain em dashes: Work.jsx=5, GrowthSurvey.jsx=7, ThankYou.jsx=4, ExitIntentPopup.jsx=2. Replace with hyphen (-), comma, or sentence break.

integration_issues.issue: Could not trigger popup via synthetic mouseout events even with sessionStorage cleared. Likely the listener requires a real cursor leave above viewport (relies on mouseleave on document). Visually it could not be verified in automation, but CSS confirms lime styling (.popup-tag color, .popup-guide-icon bg, .thanks-mark bg all use var(--lime)).

issues: .feature-icon-wrap uses background: var(--lime) with color: var(--paper) — lime + white icon has poor contrast (white on lime). Should be var(--lime-ink) (#182604) like buttons.
.thanks-mark and .popup-guide-icon also use color: var(--paper) on lime background — same low-contrast issue.
.quote-result .badge uses background: var(--lime); color: var(--paper); — white text on lime is hard to read.
.audit-input:focus and .popup-input:focus still use box-shadow rgba(87, 87, 248, 0.2) — leftover violet glow from old theme, should be lime-tinted.
.hero::before radial gradient still uses rgba(87, 87, 248, 0.04) — leftover violet tint in hero background.
.violet utility class now maps to lime (cosmetic, but confusingly named).

action_items: Fix ResellRight URL in /app/frontend/src/components/Home.jsx (caseStudies array, slug 'resellright') — replace dropquick-ja URL with the real ResellRight preview URL.
Remove em dashes (—) from Work.jsx (5), GrowthSurvey.jsx (7), ThankYou.jsx (4), ExitIntentPopup.jsx (2). Replace with '-', ',', or sentence rewrite.
Update lime-on-white contrast: change icon/text color from var(--paper) to var(--lime-ink) in .feature-icon-wrap, .thanks-mark, .popup-guide-icon, .quote-result .badge.
Replace leftover violet rgba(87, 87, 248, ...) values in :focus box-shadows and .hero::before gradient with lime-tinted equivalents.
Optional: rename .violet utility class to .lime/.accent to avoid confusion.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx is 616 lines — close to the 700-line guideline; consider splitting caseStudies data and inline SVG logos into separate files.
Inline SVGs (LogoGithub, LogoReact, etc.) are large and inline JSX — extract into /components/logos/ for reuse and to reduce Home.jsx size.
caseStudies[5].url is hardcoded duplicate — suggests no validation; consider a quick unit check or lint rule for duplicate URLs in static data.
process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL has fallback `|| ''` in Home.jsx; per env rules, omit defaults so missing config fails fast.
Same `--lime` color is bound to both selection background and primary buttons; ::selection background lime with white color is low-contrast on text.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home page UI verified end-to-end (nav centering, hero fullscreen, floating elements, marquee 20 logos, 6 case study cards, lime theme, no em dashes on home, status link replaces pill). Two confirmed bugs: ResellRight URL duplicates DropQuick URL, and em dashes still in Work/GrowthSurvey/ThankYou/ExitIntentPopup components. Exit-intent popup could not be triggered programmatically; visual verification of lime styling pending — open with real cursor leave or temporarily force-render in dev.

rca_of_the_issue.resellright_url: In Home.jsx caseStudies array (line ~202), the ResellRight entry's `url` is a copy-paste of DropQuick JA's URL ('https://dropquick-ja.preview.emergentagent.com'). Fix: replace with the correct ResellRight preview URL (e.g., 'https://resellright.preview.emergentagent.com').
rca_of_the_issue.em_dashes: Em dashes were stripped from Home.jsx only. Other components were not updated despite the requirement applying to all visible text. Bulk find/replace '—' → '-' (or contextual rewrite) is needed across Work.jsx, GrowthSurvey.jsx, ThankYou.jsx, ExitIntentPopup.jsx, plus comments in App.css/index.css if strictness extends to source.
